title: Quick check, CRM and helpdesk integrations

questions.prompt: A customer says their HubSpot screen-pop isn't firing on inbound calls, even though the contact is correctly identified in Linkus. What's the most likely cause?
choices: The HubSpot browser-extension hasn't been installed in the user's browser
questions.explanation: Two screen-pops exist: the in-Linkus one (driven by contact sync; this one's working since the contact is identified) and the in-CRM one (requires the CRM-side browser extension). When only the second one fails, the cause is almost always a missing browser extension.

questions.prompt: The Custom CRM Integration Template supports OAuth 2.0 (including Authorization Code with PKCE) and Bearer Token authentication, so it can integrate with most third-party systems that don't have a native PSE connector.
questions.explanation: Both OAuth flows (since 83.23.0.23 for PKCE) and Bearer Token (long-lived token with optional auto-refresh) are supported, plus custom request headers for arbitrary header injection. That covers most LOB systems.
